title: Apparent Ores
description: This texture makes the ores shiny
body:
![Apparent Ores](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65de41e900a3a2710b9421a2e6af69254859bc7c.png)

**OPTIFINE REQUIRED**

Illuminate your mining adventures with the 'Shiny Ores' texture pack! This pack enhances your Minecraft experience by making all ores glow in the dark, giving you better visibility while mining. Ideal for cave explorers and resource hunters, 'Shiny Ores' guarantees you won't miss a single valuable ore, even in the deepest shadows.

 

Glow in the Dark Ores:
- Every ore emits a soft glow, making them easily identifiable in dark caves and tunnels.
- Improved Visibility: Spot diamonds, gold, redstone, and more, even in low-light areas.
- Immersive Mining: Adds a magical glow to ores while preserving Minecraft's original style.
- Compatible with Other Packs: Use 'Shiny Ores' with other texture packs to enhance your custom Minecraft setup.
- Performance-Friendly: Lightweight design ensures smooth gameplay without sacrificing quality.
